nasb.text: Therefore, though I have enough confidence in Christ to order you to do what is proper,

esv.text: Accordingly, though I am bold enough in Christ to command you to do what is required,

cnv.text: 我在基督裡雖然可以放膽吩咐你作應作的事，

ccb.text: 因此，我尽管可以奉基督的名吩咐你去做当做的事，

csbs.text: 所以，虽然我在基督里大有胆量，可以吩咐你去做合宜的事，
